source_pr.title: store/tikv: optimize testing
source_pr.body:
1. remove file coprocessor_slow_test.go to reduce memory
2. accelerate some tests by setting a small commitMaxBackoff

When I `go test store/tikv`, it **eat up the whole memory** and make my laptop hang.
It makes me uncomfortable so I did some optimizing. 
After that:
```
PASS
ok  	github.com/pingcap/tidb/store/tikv	14.597s
```
It takes more than 80s before!

symptoms: -// The test takes too long under the race detector.
failure_signature: -// The test takes too long under the race detector.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to environment/external dependencies (resource contention, ports, or real cluster timing). This PR stabilizes it by: store/tikv: optimize testing.

evidence: evidence: -// The test takes too long under the race detector.
files: store/tikv/2pc.go, store/tikv/2pc_test.go, store/tikv/backoff.go, store/tikv/coprocessor_slow_test.go, store/tikv/store_test.go
